page: Microsoft Azure E64ps_v6 is an ARM-based virtual machine belonging to the Epsv6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores powered by the Microsoft Neoverse-N2 processor architecture operating at 3.4 GHz. The CPU configuration includes 64 KB of L1d cache, 1.0 MB of L2 cache, and 128 MB of L3 cache. The server is equipped with 512.0 GB of RAM, providing a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPUs, but is Premium Storage capable for remote disk attachments.

Benchmark results indicate top-tier multi-threaded performance and memory subsystem capabilities. The instance achieves top-tier status in stress-ng multi-core CPU performance, Geekbench multi-core scores, and Passmark CPU physics testing. Its memory bandwidth is highly efficient, reaching top-tier speeds in cached read-only operations and uncached large-block read/write operations. Single-core performance, such as stress-ng single-core and Geekbench single-core, falls within the average range. Cryptography and integer operations are supported, though advanced vector and matrix extensions are absent due to the ARM architecture.

Given the ARM-based architecture and high memory density of 8.0 GB per core, the E64ps_v6 offers a resource-dense profile for workloads requiring substantial memory capacity without the premium cost of x86-based memory-optimized instances. It is highly suited for memory-intensive applications, database operations, static web serving, software compilation, and multi-threaded data processing tasks.
description: The Microsoft Azure E64ps_v6 is an ARM-based virtual machine from the Epsv6 family, powered by a 64-core Microsoft Neoverse-N2 processor running at 3.4 GHz. It features 512.0 GB of system memory, yielding an 8.0 GB per core ratio, and operates on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. Lacking local storage and GPUs, it relies on Premium Storage compatibility for remote disk configurations. Benchmarks reveal top-tier multi-core CPU performance, exceptional memory bandwidth, and outstanding database operation capabilities. Conversely, single-core metrics and specialized vector instructions are more limited. This memory-optimized profile delivers qualitative cost efficiency for resource-dense deployments. It is highly suited for large-scale database operations, multi-threaded software compilation, static web serving, and memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E64ps_v6 is an ARM-based virtual machine featuring 64 dedicated Neoverse-N2 cores, 512 GB of RAM, and top-tier multi-core and memory bandwidth performance for database and enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E64ps_v6 is a 64-core ARM virtual machine with 512 GB RAM, optimized for memory-intensive databases and multi-threaded workloads.
tagline: A high-density ARM-based virtual machine delivering exceptional memory bandwidth and multi-core performance for database and enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated ARM Neoverse-N2 physical cores running at 3.4 GHz
512.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
Top-tier multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth benchmark results
Premium Storage capable for high-performance remote disk attachments
Optimized for database operations, software compilation, and web serving
